title: Timeline
description: Vertical list of chronological events with dot, icon or outline markers. Each item supports title, description, timestamp and a per-item color.

props.items: Events to render in chronological order.
props.variant: Default marker style. Each item can override it.
props.color: Default semantic color of the marker.
props.size: Visual scale of the marker and typography.
props.side: Side where the marker line is rendered.

slots.itemId: Extra content rendered below the title and description of the item with the corresponding id.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Dot markers with title and timestamp.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Icon markers for richer visual context.

colors.title: Per-item colors
colors.desc: Each event can override the marker color independently.

descriptions.title: With descriptions
descriptions.desc: Add secondary text below each event title.

right.title: Right side
right.desc: Moves the marker line to the right of the content.
